entities.name: STREPTOMYCES
entities.description: Isolates of actinomycetes used for biological control and plant growth promotion in chickpea

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: A group of Gram-positive bacteria to which Streptomyces belongs

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop for biological control and growth promotion studies

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of organisms to suppress phyto-pathogens

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING TRAITS
entities.description: Physiological characteristics that enhance plant growth

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce siderophores for iron sequestration

entities.name: CHITINASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce chitinase to degrade fungal cell walls

entities.name: CELLULASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce cellulase to degrade cellulose

entities.name: LIPASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce lipase to degrade lipids

entities.name: PROTEASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce protease to degrade proteins

entities.name: HYDROCYANIC ACID PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce hydrocyanic acid as an antimicrobial agent

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce indole acetic acid, a plant growth hormone

entities.name: BETA-1,3-GLUCANASE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce beta-1,3-glucanase to degrade glucans

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the plant root system

entities.name: ROOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the plant root system

entities.name: NODULE NUMBERS
entities.description: The number of root nodules formed

entities.name: SHOOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the plant shoot system

entities.name: POD NUMBERS
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the pods produced

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The total biomass of the plant excluding the grain

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grains

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The amount of total nitrogen in the rhizosphere soil

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus available for plant uptake in the rhizosphere

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The amount of organic carbon in the rhizosphere soil

entities.name: DUAL-CULTURE ASSAY
entities.description: A method to evaluate antagonistic potential against pathogens

entities.name: METABOLITE PRODUCTION ASSAY
entities.description: A method to evaluate the production of antimicrobial metabolites

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to visualize the colonization of roots by bacteria

entities.name: 16S RDNA ANALYSIS
entities.description: A molecular method used for the identification of bacterial species

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method to study the evolutionary relationships between organisms

entities.name: IN VITRO
entities.description: Experimental conditions performed in a controlled environment outside a living organism

entities.name: IN VIVO
entities.description: Experimental conditions performed within a living organism

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The thermal environment ranging from 20 to 40 °C

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the environment ranging from 7 to 11

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The concentration of salts in the environment up to 4%

entities.description: A fungicide used to test the tolerance of Streptomyces

entities.description: A fungicide used to test the tolerance of Streptomyces

entities.description: A fungicide used to test the tolerance of Streptomyces

entities.name: BENLATE
entities.description: A fungicide used to test the tolerance of Streptomyces

entities.name: RIDOMIL
entities.description: A fungicide used to test the tolerance of Streptomyces

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment for plant growth studies

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: An open-air environment for plant growth studies

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil region immediately surrounding plant roots
